name: MHA Competencies
description: Collects all .csv MHA competency reports into a single workbook, with a worksheet with per-student data.

inputs.label: CSV Reports Folder
inputs.description: Folder containing Canvas outcomes .csv exports (one per course)

outputs.label: Output Folder
outputs.description: Folder where the output workbook will be saved

outputs.label: Output File Name
outputs.description: Name for the generated workbook (without extension)
